task_completion.description: Verify the original Q2 event remains unchanged
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Q2 Financial Review' event in the calendar or list view to ensure it has not been overwritten or deleted.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new event with the correct title
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new calendar event titled 'Q3 Financial Review' in the calendar view or event details form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new event is scheduled correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the date and time of the 'Q3 Financial Review' event. It should be scheduled exactly 14 days (two weeks) after the Q2 event, from 10:00 to 11:30.

task_completion.description: Verify the location of the new event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the location field in the 'Q3 Financial Review' event details. It must be set to 'Board Room'.

task_completion.description: Verify the description of the new event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the description field of the 'Q3 Financial Review' event. It should contain the required text, specifically including the keywords 'Q3', 'financial performance', and 'forecasting'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attendees of the new event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the attendees or guests list for the 'Q3 Financial Review' event. It must include all original attendees (Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, Henry Kim) plus the newly added attendee (Grace Patel).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web-based calendar application (like Odoo), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the event creation/duplication workflow
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like opening the Q2 event, clicking duplicate, editing the form fields, and saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state must be shown within the actual calendar application interface, not a generic text document or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Base event: 'Q2 Financial Review'. Target event: 'Q3 Financial Review'. The target event must be scheduled exactly 14 days after the base event, with the same duration (10:00 - 11:30). Required location: 'Board Room'. Required description keywords: 'Q3', 'financial performance', 'forecasting'. Required attendees: Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, Henry Kim, Grace Patel. The original Q2 event must still exist.
